_purpose: Per-series adequacy block to be merged into Technical/series_registry.json by the main thread after Wave 3 closeout.

Phase 5: validate substituted ratio against Shaikh's published Fig 16.9 values at sample years (1975, 1985, 2000, 2007, 2011); document magnitude of CMDEBT/PI vs HCCSDODNS/DPI divergence as evidence of wrong-concept-proxy failure mode

S1605.proxy_justification: S1605 was a CD2 wrong-concept-proxy correction, NOT a new proxy substitution. CMDEBT (households+nonprofits) and PI (pre-tax) were CD2-inherited proxies that diverged from book spec. HCCSDODNS (households-only, Z.1 D.3 line 2) and DPI (Disposable Personal Income, NIPA T2.1 line 27) restore book-spec fidelity. Both substitutes match Shaikh's explicit Appendix 16.1 citations directly — no proxy classification warranted.

url_substitutions.rationale: BLS landing page returns HTTP 403 to bot User-Agent (verified 2026-05-18); underlying WPS00000000 data fully reachable via FRED mirror or data.bls.gov direct series-ID endpoint (both 200). For citation provenance keep bls.gov as Shaikh-era source page; for data fetch use FRED/data.bls.gov.

BLS landing page returns HTTP 403 to bot User-Agent (verified 2026-05-18); underlying PRS84006093 + PRS84006153 fully reachable via data.bls.gov direct or FRED mirror (all 200). For citation provenance keep bls.gov; for data fetch use FRED/data.bls.gov.

Book footnote on p. 898 has typo bls.org for bls.gov. Canonicalize bls.gov in all RSCD output and dossier text. (Note: bls.org coincidentally redirects to a live page but is not the BLS — must not be cited.)

GPO Access decommissioned 2012; URL is DNS-dead (verified 2026-05-18 — getaddrinfo failed). ERP migrated to govinfo.gov (200 verified). Practical extension for ERP Table 73 col 1 (3-month T-bill) via FRED TB3MS.

data_substitutions.concept: Household debt (book spec: Z.1 Table D.3 line 2, household sector excl. nonprofits)
data_substitutions.cd2_proxy_used: FRED CMDEBT (Households + Nonprofit Organizations Credit Market Instruments Liability, millions USD)

canonical_substitute.source: FRED HCCSDODNS (Households Debt Securities and Loans Liability)

data_substitutions.concept_match_justification: HCCSDODNS matches Shaikh's stated source Z.1 D.3 line 2 (households-only, excluding nonprofit organizations) directly. CMDEBT includes nonprofits and is therefore a wrong-concept proxy per anu-framework No Proxies rule. Substitution RESTORES book-spec fidelity; not a NEW proxy.
data_substitutions.anu_framework_rule: No Proxies (MANDATORY) — CD2 inherited wrong-concept proxy CMDEBT for households-only Z.1 D.3 line 2; correction restores book fidelity.

data_substitutions.concept: Household disposable income (book spec: BEA NIPA T2.1 line 27, Disposable Personal Income)
data_substitutions.cd2_proxy_used: FRED PI (Personal Income, pre-tax broader, billions USD SAAR)

canonical_substitute.source: FRED DPI (Disposable Personal Income, BEA NIPA T2.1 line 27)

data_substitutions.concept_match_justification: DPI matches Shaikh's stated source NIPA T2.1 line 27 (Disposable Personal Income, after-tax) directly. PI is pre-tax Personal Income and is therefore a wrong-concept proxy per anu-framework No Proxies rule. Substitution RESTORES book-spec fidelity; not a NEW proxy.
data_substitutions.anu_framework_rule: No Proxies (MANDATORY) — CD2 inherited wrong-concept proxy PI for after-tax DPI; correction restores book fidelity.

data_substitutions.concept: Trade-weighted OECD short-term interest rate aggregate (book spec: Shaikh+Ragab bespoke Fed H.10 × IMF IFS construction)
data_substitutions.discontinued_source: None — input sources (Fed H.10, IMF IFS) both active

canonical_substitute_replicated.label: S1603_replicated
canonical_substitute_replicated.source: Fed H.10 broad-index trade weights × IMF IFS country money market / T-bill rates, aggregated annually with latest-vintage weights
canonical_substitute_replicated.license: Public-domain (Fed H.10 US-Gov) + IMF IFS free dissemination
canonical_substitute_replicated.concept_match_justification: Faithful rebuild of Shaikh+Ragab methodology using original input sources. Latest-vintage Fed H.10 weights used for all years 1960-2024 to avoid weight churn. NOT a proxy.

canonical_substitute_approximation.label: S1603_oecd_mei
canonical_substitute_approximation.source: OECD MEI IRSTCI01 'Short-term interest rates' pre-aggregated series
canonical_substitute_approximation.concept_match_justification: OECD MEI IRSTCI01 uses GDP-PPP weighting vs Shaikh's Fed H.10 trade weighting; basket composition partially overlaps but is not identical. Flagged `proxy: true` with explicit Concept Match Justification noting basket-weight methodology difference. Low-effort variant for users who do not require book-fidelity replication.

S1603_oecd_mei.concept_match_justification: GDP-PPP vs trade-weight basket difference; both measure trade-weighted OECD short-term interest rates
